offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, inaccurate commission calculations cause payment delays. We automate commission calculations instead of manual calculations using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate commission calculations lead to payment delays and disputes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers
Indie Hackers posts on commission calculation issues

try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
